summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ADHD Tools Phase 2 features. All features working correctly: Sound toggle in Focus Session, Time Blindness Guard (accuracy tracking), Energy-Aware Scheduling (peak productivity windows), and Rewards Center (streaks, badges, XP, levels). Fixed one backend bug in time-blindness stats API.
critical_code_review_comments: All 6 tabs (Task Chunker, Focus Timer, Dopamine Menu, Time Guard, Energy, Rewards) are properly implemented with data-testid attributes
Sound toggle in Focus Session header works correctly with Volume2/VolumeX icons
Time Blindness Guard shows accuracy percentage, focus time, sessions, and recent task estimates
Energy-Aware Scheduling shows personalized recommendation based on user's activity patterns
Rewards Center displays Level, XP, streak, badges, and comprehensive stats
Backend APIs return correct data structures for all Phase 2 endpoints
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Fixed time-blindness stats API null handling bug
seed_data_creation: Test user has 1 completed task ('Clean my room') and 1 focus session for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: ADHD Tools Phase 2 fully tested. All 6 tabs working: Task Chunker, Focus Timer, Dopamine Menu, Time Guard (time estimation accuracy), Energy (peak productivity), Rewards (gamification). Sound notifications use Web Audio API.

Sound toggle button appears in Focus Ses.details: Sound toggle (Volume2/VolumeX icons) visible in top-right of Focus Session header, toggles correctly

Time Blindness Guard tab shows accuracy.details: Shows 100% accuracy in large text, based on 1 completed task

Time Blindness Guard shows focus time an.details: Shows Focus Time (0h 25m) and Sessions (1) with icons

Energy-Aware Scheduling shows recommenda.details: Shows 'Your Recommendation' section with personalized advice: 'Your peak productivity is during the morning. Schedule demanding tasks then!'

Energy-Aware Scheduling shows peak produ.details: Peak Productivity Hours section visible (empty for new users, populates with mood log data)

Rewards Center shows Level and XP.details: Shows 'Level 1' with trophy icon and '17 XP earned' with progress bar

Rewards Center shows current streak.details: Shows 'Current Streak: 1 days' with flame icon and 'Keep the fire burning!' message

Rewards Center shows badges earned.details: Shows 'Badges Earned (1)' section with 'First Step' badge - 'Completed your first task'

Rewards Center shows stats (tasks, chunk.details: Shows Tasks Completed (1), Chunks Crushed (1), Focus Sessions (1), Total Focus Time (0h 25m)

All 6 tabs are visible and switchable.details: All tabs visible: Task Chunker, Focus Timer, Dopamine Menu, Time Guard, Energy, Rewards. Tab switching works correctly.

Backend APIs return correct data for tim.details: All 3 Phase 2 APIs tested: /api/tools/time-blindness/stats, /api/tools/energy/patterns, /api/tools/rewards/stats - all return correct data structures

bug_fixed.issue: TypeError: '>' not supported between instances of 'NoneType' and 'int' in time-blindness stats API
bug_fixed.fix: Added null checks for estimated and actual values before comparison
